name: DoIP_ForceLocalTCPSendPort
title: DoIP_ForceLocalTCPSendPort
description: Forces local TCP send port to a specific value. According to ISO13400, the local send port for outgoing TCP connections should be dynamically selected. This function allows forcing the local TCP send port to a specific value, typically to 13400 to indicate DoIP. Note that specifying a well-known or system port (1..1023) might not work on most systems.

parameters.name: forcedPort
parameters.description: 0: use a dynamically assigned value (default)1..65535: send from this local TCP portother: reserved
